And so, having freed the Mythic Cats: the Battle Cats returned to their
proper homes in the present day.
Welcome home, The Battle Cats!
I was a little bummed the only souvenir they brought
back after all that epic time travel was nothing but
a box of duty-free macadamia nut chocolates, though.
At long last,
The Battle Cats and their new Mythic Cat comrades
will usher in a radiant and joyous new era for all!
...Or so I thought.
Once again, things didn't quite work out that way.
To my surprise,
it turns out
The Battle Cats instead had traveled to
the completely wrong era!
I bumped into the Cat Army's PR guy at

He said the Cats started to suspect

wearing neon windbreakers
and acid-wash jeans...
What's more, he let slip that in the end, the Cats they'd rescued
weren't actually the Mythic Cats, but just their descendants!
Plus, that same shadowy conspiracy was
now researching how to awaken Relic powers.
So, the Cats had no choice but to gear up to time travel
once again and at last free the TRUE Mythic Cats.
Oh yeah ー check this out!
All that online buzz about a massive gathering
of Cats at the summit of Mt. Everest...
that's what that was all about!
And so, the Cats' second attempt at time travel
was once again another flawless success,
and The Battle Cats have now departed for
an era even more ancient and distant.
Anyway,
Don't sweat the small stuff,
The Battle Cats!
You got this,
The Battle Cats!
Backward to an age of Uncanny Legends,
The Battle Cats!
